title: koeleria dactyloides
intro: Koeleria dactyloides, also known as June grass, is a perennial grass species native to Eurasia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Koeleria dactyloides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Koeleria dactyloides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile natural remedy.
